text:
Hormone Cookies ホルモンクッキー - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. These cookies when eaten, will temporarily change the consumer's sex for 24 hours.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Hormone Cookies ホルモンクッキー - These cookies when ingested, temporarily changes the user's gender to the opposite sex. These effects last for 24 hours. The card gives you 10 boxes, with each box containing 20 cookies.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"

このクッキーを食べると24時間の制限付きで性別が変わる。１箱20枚入り。10箱セット。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.033 - Hormone Cookies 
Eat this cookie to change sex, restricted to 24-hours. 20 per box. 10 box set.
|}
